message:
refactor: cleanup unused code and improve overlay handling

- Remove dead code from config.rs and security.rs
- Improve dependencies.rs error handling
- Enhance overlay.rs with better skill layering logic
- Update Cargo.lock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
